What's up, Jim Lawrence? It is Revan. I am back with another video. So we have the accountability challenge and I want to show you how to add contacts into the accountability challenge. So ideally you want all your members in here and that's what I'm going to show you how to do. So if we had all of these people and they were all members, we would basically select here. In this case, I only have 16 contacts, but if you have like 200 members or something crazy like that, you'll have something that pops up right around here where it says, select more contacts because it only selects 25 at a time, unless you specifically ask it to select all of them. And it'll give you like a blue link that you can click right around this area. That'll say select more than 25 or it'll let you know you have 25 selected. You want to select more, something along those lines, but keep an eye out for that. That way you make sure you're selecting more than just 25 people, the first 25 that show up. So once you have all of them selected, what you're going to do is add them to a campaign. Once you click add to campaign, you're going to want to come down here and then I have mine right under here. Here's the accountability challenge and then you're going to click add and that will add all of those people to the accountability challenge. Likewise, to remove them, let's say somebody was like, Hey, I don't want to get these texts anymore. If you wanted to remove somebody, what you'd have to do is either find their contact or if you have too many contacts, you don't feel like looking for them. Ask them what their email address is and then you can search it up by let's say test a at sample.com. I know that's one of the emails. So this pulls up the email and contact for John Doe and now John Doe, I see what part or campaign he's a part of and I would remove him from it. So let's actually add him to a campaign real quick. Add him to this. So let's say we added him to as well as the accountability challenge. So they're getting text messages and emails from both of these. They texted us and told us to stop. We find their contact and then all we have to do is come over and remove them from the campaign just like that. So from any campaign, that's how you remove somebody other than that. Hope this video helps you guys and I will see you in the next one. Keep crushing it. Jim.
